violations.text: Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label (200 - 400 ppm). Sanitizer solution was adjusted to the proper range of 200 - 400 ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

At the time of inspection, the small chest cooler gasket was observed to be in poor repair. A buildup of ice on the lid was not allowing for proper tight sealing of the lid. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the Walk-In Cooler fan shrouds were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (currently equipped with an air break. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. The prep sink drain is to be adjusted to a proper air break. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024
The floor tile in the dishwashing area is in poor repair (chipped/cracking). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
